title: Reinventing Entropy | Compression is Intelligence Part 1
summary: A visual explanation of entropy and information theory through the lens that compression is fundamentally linked to intelligence. The video explores Shannon's information theory, the compressibility of language, and how prediction and compression relate to understanding entropy and information content.
